speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chup-chap aansoo peeti rahi taaki kalesh na ho
text: Mujhe kuch samajh nahi aa raha. Papa ne aaj subah bina mujhse pooche announce kar diya ki mera rishta hamari biradari mein tay ho gaya hai. Mera ek inter-caste relationship hai, but main kuch bol hi nahi payi izzat ke darr se. Main bas chup-chap aansoo peeti rahi taaki kalesh na ho aur ghar ki shanti bhang na ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the helplessness and relational sacrifice without jumping to solutions.
text: Tumhare papa ne achanak se ye sab tay kar diya, aur parivaar ki shanti ke khatir tum andar hi andar ro kar sab bardasht kar rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chup-chap aansoo peeti rahi
text: Haan, bilkul. Main abhi padhai bhi complete karna chahti hoon. Par unke saamne meri aawaz hi nahi nikal rahi. I just feel so trapped. Main nahi chahti ki meri wajah se ghar mein koi bada tamasha ho, isliye chup-chap aansoo peeti rahi subah se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the fear of consequence if she speaks up.
text: Aisa lag raha hai ki agar tumne apne sapno aur pyar ke baare mein kuch bhi kaha, toh ghar ka mahaul poori tarah bigad jayega, aur wahi darr tumhe roke hue hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Hamari family mein ladkiyan bolti nahi hain. Pata nahi log kya kahenge, sab rishtedaar taane marenge. Kya main sach mein galat kar rahi hoon apni life ka soch ke?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the stigma and self-doubt using a soft pause.
text: Tum apni life ke bare mein sochne ko galat maan rahi ho kyunki bachpan se yahi sikhaya gaya hai ki parivaar ke faisle hi sabse upar hote hain...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ghar ki shanti bhang na ho
text: Wahi toh. Agar maine abhi inkaar kiya, toh unki society mein naak kat jayegi. I can't do that to my parents, par main andar se mar rahi hoon. Bas yahi lagta hai ki kuch bhi karke bas ghar ki shanti bhang na ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask about the internal conflict between her sacrifice and her pain.
text: Itna bada bojh akele utha rahi ho. Jab tum khud andar se itna takleef mein ho, toh yeh chup rehne ka bojh kaisa lag raha hai tumhe?

speaker: Seeker
text: Bahut thakan hoti hai. Raat bhar so nahi pati. Lagta hai jaise sab khatam ho gaya. Kabhi kabhi toh lagta hai mere hone ya na hone se kya hi farq padta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the mild risk and reflect the duration of the pain.
text: Aisi thakan hona bilkul natural hai jab lagatar itna sochna pad raha ho. Raaton ki neend ud chuki hai aur lag raha hai jaise har rasta band ho raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Mere partner ne kaha ki main apne parents se baat karu, but usko kaise samjhaun ki humare yahan inter-caste bilkul allowed nahi hai. Biradari wale jeene nahi denge mere parents ko.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational impossibility.
text: Tumhare partner ko shayad us pressure ka andaza nahi hai, jo tum society aur biradari ke taano ko lekar mehsus kar rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chup-chap aansoo peeti rahi
text: Nahi hai andaza. Mujhe dono taraf se khichav mehsus ho raha hai. Isliye toh jab rishte ki baat hui main chup-chap aansoo peeti rahi. Main apni wajah se kisi ka dil nahi todna chahti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the core conflict emotion (TRAPPED).
text: Lagta hai tum apne hi ghar mein aur rishton ke beech puri tarah se trapped mehsus kar rahi ho, jahan ek taraf pyar hai aur doosri taraf parivaar ka samman.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ekdum sahi baat hai. Trapped hi lag raha hai. Main kiski sunu? Mujhe apni padhai bhi karni hai, itni mehnat ki hai maine entrance ke liye, ab sab bekar lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her struggle based on the region/category reality.
text: Yeh trapped wali feeling bahut waajib hai, kyunki humare yahan ladkiyon par izzat aur rishton ka itna bada bojh dal diya jata hai ki unke apne sapne secondary ho jate hain; isme tumhari koi galti nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Lekin galti toh lagti hai. Papa itne pyaar se keh rahe the, maine unko khush dekha. Main selfish feel kar rahi hoon jab apne baare mein sochti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic anecdote.
text: Apne parivaar ko le kar yeh guilt bahut common hai—sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki bachpan se hume sikhaya jata hai ki maa-baap ki khushi mein hi apni khushi honi chahiye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan yahi sikha hai. Isliye main kisi ko kuch keh nahi pa rahi. Par samajh nahi aa raha aage ka... main kab tak aise andar hi andar ghut ti rahungi?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Wait for readiness signal before moving to action.
text: Thik keh rahi ho. Is ghutan ke baare mein soch kar kaisa mehsoos hota hai jab tum aage ke baare mein sochti ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Aage ka soch kar blank ho jati hoon. Lekin ab mujhse aur saha nahi ja raha. Koi raasta hai kya jisse main apni padhai ke liye time maang saku unse bina ladai kiye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer small, non-confrontational ways to ask for time.
text: Tum kuch chote tareeke apna sakti ho—jaise kisi trusted elder, shaid apni mummy, se sirf padhai poori karne ka time maangne par baat karna, ya apne career goals ko gently papa ko likh kar dena, taaki direct clash na ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Mummy se baat shayad thodi aasaan ho... wo meri padhai ko thoda support karti hain. Lekin unhe approach kaise karu main?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through the process step by step.
text: Pehle ek shaant waqt dekho jab mummy free hon… phir sirf padhai ki ehmiyat par baat shuru karo ki 'mummy abhi padhai mein itna time lagna hai'… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Okay, yeh lag raha hai ki main kar sakti hoon. Rishte ke baare mein abhi baat nahi karungi, sirf time maang lungi padhai ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe.
text: Kayi baar humare families mein padhai ko lekar permission maangna shaadi inkaar karne se zyada aasaan hota hai, kyunki education bhi ek tarah ki 'izzat' badhati hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: True, agar main entrance clear kar lu toh shayad unka thoda dhyaan us taraf chala jaye. But agar mummy ne papa ko bol diya aur papa gussa hue toh?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror fear.
text: Dekha jaye toh tumhare andar yeh darr abhi bhi hai ki ek choti si koshish bhi shayad us ghar ki shanti ko khatre mein daal sakti hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ghar ki shanti bhang na ho
text: Haan thoda toh darr lag raha hai... ki main aage badhu aur phir se wahi taane shuru na ho jayein. Kalesh na ho bas.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask for clarification.
text: Ghar mein jab is tarah ke taane shuru hote hain, toh tum aam taur par khud ko shant rakhne ke liye kya karti ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main apne kamre mein band karke notes likhti hoon, padhai par dhyaan lagati hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror behavior.
text: To tum us kalesh se bachne ke liye padhai ko hi apni panah bana leti ho, takki kisi se behes na ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, wahi best lagta hai mujhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer another small suggestion.
text: Tab toh yeh ek accha idea ho sakta hai ki jab bhi ghar me aise topic chhidhe, tum calmly padhai ka bahana kar ke thoda time ke liye dur hat jao.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main aaisa kar sakti hoon. Isse kisi ko bura bhi nahi lagega aur main bhi apne aap ko thoda bacha sakungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframe.
text: Apni mental shanti ko bachana ghar ki shanti bachane jitna hi zaruri hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thodi himmat mili ye baat kar ke. Kam se kam ek direction dikh raha hai aaj ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Check in on current state.
text: Khushi hui ki tumhe thodi thakan kam lagi. Aaj ab aage apna khayal kaise rakhogi tum?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main abhi chalkar bas thodi der padhai karungi, shanti se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Close.
text: Yeh badiya raasta chuna tumne abhi apni aur apni padhai ki shanti banaye rakhne ka.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Apne rishte aur azaadi dono ka gala ghot kar main bas isliye chup hoon taaki khandaan ka naam kharab na ho
text: Hello... I don't know if I should even say this, but I'm just so anxious. Jab Papa ko mere dusre religion wale boyfriend ke baare mein pata chala, toh unhone aaj achanak faisla suna diya ki mera college jana band aur ghar se nikalne par pabandi hai. I am in my final year. Apne rishte aur azaadi dono ka gala ghot kar main bas isliye chup hoon taaki khandaan ka naam kharab na ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational sacrifice frame using Lens C.
text: Tumhare aakhri saal mein achanak se college jana band kar diya gaya, aur parivaar ke naam ko bachane ke liye tum apni azaadi aur apni baatein apne hi andar daba kar rakh rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chup hoon taaki khandaan ka naam kharab na ho
text: Yes, exactly. I mean, unse behas karna toh possible hi nahi hai. Hamare yahan baap ki aagya ke khilaf jana sabse bada paap mana jata hai. But I am suffocating. Is it wrong that I feel this way?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence using Lens E.
text: Aisa lag raha hai ki agar tumne apne mann ki baat keh di, toh use ek paap ki tarah dekha jayega aur is darr se tum khud ko ghutne par majboor kar rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ha, it's terrifying. Pura din kamre mein band rehti hoon. He said dusre religion ke ladke se baat karna unki izzat mitti mein milana hai. I feel like maybe I am a bad daughter for causing all this drama in the house.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the stigma cue softly without a question, using Lens B.
text: Tumhe lag raha hai ki apni pasand aur apne religion se bahar jana tumhein ek buri beti bana deta hai, aur ye soch tumhein andar hi andar kha rahi hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Apne rishte aur azaadi dono ka gala ghot kar
text: I really try to be good. I study hard, I never go out late. But ab achanak meri degree rok di gayi hai. I just cry when I see my books. Meri azaadi ka gala ghot diya, bas isliye ki main unki aagya maan lun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Explore the contrast between her effort to be good and the restriction on her studies.
text: Jab tum in kitaabon ko dekhti ho jinme tumne itni mehnat ki, toh apne parivaar ki shanti ke liye chup rehna kaisa lagta hai us pal mein?

speaker: Seeker
text: It feels completely hopeless. Like my life is over. Main bas yahi sochti hoon ki kya faayda aise jeene ka agar meri koi aukaat hi nahi hai is ghar mein. Sorry, I shouldn't say such things.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the mild risk and use Lens D to mirror the feeling of it being over.
text: Aisi niraasha mehsoos hona bilkul samajh aata hai jab sab kuch achanak rook diya jaye, aur tumhe lagne lage ki ab aage ke liye kuch bacha hi nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chup hoon taaki khandaan ka naam kharab na ho
text: Yeah... I am just stuck. Mere pass koi phone nahi hai, laptop bhi le liya. I am talking to you from my mom's phone while she is bathing. Main bas trapped feel kar rahi hoon, dono ke beech mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the core conflict emotion (TRAPPED) explicitly.
text: Lagta hai tum puri tarah se trapped aur helpless mehsoos kar rahi ho, jahan ek taraf apni padhai ka sapna hai aur dusri taraf gharwalon ka dabaav.

speaker: Seeker
text: Totally trapped. Mummy bhi bas ro rahi hain, she says I brought shame. I feel like mere wajeh se sab dukhi hain, but I also want to finish my degree at least. Bahut galat hai kya aesa sochna?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her desire for education in her cultural context.
text: Apni aakhri saal ki degree puri karne ka sochna bilkul galat nahi hai, kyunki hamare yahan aksar parivaar ki 'izzat' ka saara bojh ladkiyon par daal diya jata hai jisme unki apni padhai aur sapne peeche chhut jate hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi bojh lag raha hai. I don't want people to point fingers at my parents because I chose a guy from another religion. Maybe I should just give up on him, aur college bhi chhod doon. Kam se kam ghar me shanti toh aayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the stigma cue and sacrifice frame with a shorter restatement.
text: Tum apne parents ko taano se bachane ke liye apna pyaar aur azaadi sab kuch qurban karne ka soch rahi ho...

speaker: Seeker
text: I feel I have no other choice. Papa meri baat kabhi nahi sunenge. Mere haath se sab kuch ja raha hai aur main bas helplessly dekh rahi hoon. Is there any other way?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic anecdote regarding young women in similar households.
text: Hamare yahan ladkiyon ki azaadi aur college dono ek jhatke mein rok dena bahut common hai—sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki khandaan ka naam sabse upar rakha jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: It is so unfair. But I can't change the society or my father. Par mujhe apni degree toh khatam karni hai. Ab kya karoon samajh nahi aa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer small, non-confrontational steps acknowledging readiness.
text: Degree poori karna sach mein zaruri hai, toh shayad mummy ke zariye ek request ki ja sakti hai sirf exams dene ke liye, ya kisi bade rishtedar ko samjhane ke liye shamil kiya ja sakta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Mummy se main exams ke liye request kar sakti hoon. She knows mera kitna important saal hai. But she is also scared of Papa.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through talking to the mother.
text: Pehle jab mummy akele hon aur thodi shaant hon, tab unse sirf padhai aur future ke baare mein choti si baat karna… phir unhe samjhana ki degree se unki bhi izzat badhegi… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeah, I can do that. I won't mention anything else. Just the degree. Agar exams chhoot gaye toh meri mehnat barbaad ho jayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic reframe on education and honor.
text: Kayi parivaaron mein jab baat education ki hoti hai, toh usko bhi samaj mein samman ka ek hissa maana jata hai, isliye sirf padhai par focus rakhna ek safe rasta ho sakta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chup hoon taaki khandaan ka naam kharab na ho
text: I really hope that works. Lekin agar unhone saaf inkaar kar diya aur mujhpe aur chillaye? Main chup hi isliye hoon taaki further arguments na ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror fear of arguments.
text: Phir se inkaar sunne aur ghar mein naya bawaal khada hone ka darr tumhe abhi bhi piche kheench raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Main Papa ki aagya ke khilaf aawaaz uthane ka soch bhi nahi sakti. Just the thought gives me shivers.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask how she manages the physical sensation of fear.
text: Jab yeh darr itna badh jata hai ki tumhe ghabrahat hone lagti hai, toh us waqt tum apne aap ko kaise sambhalti ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: I usually just pray or likh leti hoon apni diary mein. It helps a bit. Aur jab time milta hai toh thoda syllabus revise kar leti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her coping.
text: To tum us mushkil waqt mein apne aap ko akela kar ke aur apni padhai ya diary ka sahara lekar shaant karne ki koshish karti ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes, I feel safer that way. Main abhi bhi diary mein hi likhne ja rahi thi jab phone dekha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer another suggestion based on her coping.
text: Kabhi jab ghar mein tension zyada ho, toh usi diary mein sirf apna syllabus aur padhai ke agle steps likhna tumhe thoda control wapas de sakta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: I can do that. It makes me feel like main at least academically aage badh rahi hoon, even if main physical college nahi ja pa rahi abhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe again about maintaining internal strength.
text: Jab bahar ki azaadi par pabandi lag jaye, tab apne dimaag aur padhai ki azaadi ko zinda rakhna ek choti par mazboot shuruaat hoti hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Apne rishte aur azaadi dono ka gala ghot kar
text: True. It gives me a little hope. Main abhi rishte ka jikra nahi karungi. Sirf padhai bacha lu.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror determination.
text: Abhi apna poora dhyaan apni degree par lagane ka tay karna, ek waqt par ek hi jimmedari nibhane jaisa hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes, I feel slightly better having said this out loud. Ghar par toh kisi se baat bhi nahi kar sakti is baare mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final check in.
text: Khushi hui sunkar ki yeh bojh thoda halka hua. Abhi aage padhai ke saath-saath apni health ka dhyan rakhogi na?

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes, mummy wapas aane wali hongi, I will keep the phone now. Diary mein syllabus mark karungi. Thank you for listening.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Close gently.
text: Aise mushkil waqt mein aage ke exams ke liye diary likhna ek bahut samajhdari ka kadam hai; apna khayal rakhna.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Apne pyar ko kurban karke main ek achi beti banne ka farz nibha rahi hoon taaki ghar ki maryada bachi rahe
text: Apne pyar ko kurban karke main ek achi beti banne ka farz nibha rahi hoon taaki ghar ki maryada bachi rahe. Papa ne aaj sabke samne keh diya ki agar maine us dusri caste wale ladke se shadi ki, toh unki 'izzat' mitti mein mil jayegi aur meri choti behen ke liye kabhi koi aacha rishta nahi aayega. I just feel so guilty for even thinking about my own happiness. I am completely helpless.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational sacrifice for the family.
text: Sabke saamne Papa ki baatein sunkar, aur apni choti behen ke future ki fikar mein tumne apne pyaar ko peeche chhod diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: maine apne hoth see liye
text: Haan... I couldn't say a word. Maine apne hoth see liye. If I speak up, pura parivaar samaaj ki nazron mein gir jayega. I don't want to ruin my sister's life. But andar se I am dying. Am I a bad person for wanting my own life?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Address the stigma softly and mirror the feared consequence.
text: Tumhe lagta hai ki apne pyaar ko chun-na tumhe ek buri insaan bana dega kyunki isse tumhari behen ka future khatre mein padh sakta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Humari society mein caste is such a big deal. Papa bol rahe the ki log unke muh par thukenge. I can't let my parents face that humiliation just for me. Par usko chhodna feels impossible.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask how she manages the pain of this impossible choice.
text: Apne parents ki izzat bachane ka itna bada bojh jab akele uthati ho, tab andar jo ye takleef ho rahi hai, uske saath tum kaise waqt beeta rahi ho?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek achi beti banne ka farz
text: I just cry in the washroom where nobody can hear me. Bahar aati hoon toh I smile like everything is normal. Ek achi beti banne ka farz nibhana itna aasan nahi hai. I have to pretend to be strong for my sister.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the role expectation she forces upon herself.
text: Ghar ki achi aur majboot beti hone ka farz poora karne ke liye tum apne saare aansoo washroom ki deewaron ke beech chupa leti ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes, I have to hide everything. Sometimes I feel like it would be easier if I just didn't exist. Then neither my family would suffer the shame nor I would have to make this painful choice.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Handle the mild risk safely and reflect the prolonged exhaustion.
text: Aise bhari khayal aana samajh aata hai jab takleef itni deep ho... itne time se tum apne hi ghar mein ek dohari zindagi jee rahi ho, jo bahut thaka dene wala hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: It is very exhausting. Main us ladke se bhi baat nahi kar pa rahi thik se, I feel guilty talking to him because I am hiding this, and I feel guilty ignoring my parents. I'm just completely stuck.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the core emotion of feeling trapped in relational preservation.
text: Lagta hai tum apne hi farz aur pyaar ke is bhanwar mein poori tarah se trapped mehsus kar rahi ho, jahan koi bhi raasta chuno, kisi na kisi ka dil tutega hi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apne hoth see liye
text: That's exactly it. TRAPPED. Agar pyar chuna toh parents ki maryada khatam, aur agar unhe chuna toh meri apni life khatam. Isiliye sabke saamne maine apne hoth see liye. It's like I have no right over my own destiny.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her struggle based on societal and cultural norms.
text: Tumhara yeh sochna aur helpless feel karna bilkul natural hai, kyunki humare yahan aksar parivaar ki 'maryada' ka pura daboav betiyon par daal diya jata hai; is poori uljhan mein tumhari khud ki koi galti nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: But I still feel guilty. I wish caste didn't matter. I just wish unhe samajh aata ki wo ladka kitna acha hai. Par wo sirf uski caste dekh rahe hain, and I can't even argue back.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic context regarding caste and family honor.
text: Humare Hindi belt ke parivaaron mein yeh izzat ka sawal uthna bahut common hai—sirf tumhare ghar mein nahi, lekin koi openly ispe awaz nahi uthata kyunki samaj ka darr baccho ki khushi se bada maana jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeah, samaaj and log kya kahenge is everything for them. Even my mom was crying quietly and begging me silently to just drop it for the sake of my sister's future rishta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the emotional blackmail of the mother's tears.
text: Mummy ke un khamosh aansuon ne tumhe aur bhi zyada majboor kar diya hai ki tumhara ek step sach mein tumhari choti behen ki zindagi kharab kar dega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. I can't be selfish like that. But I can't just cut my partner off instantly either, my heart aches for him. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha ki main abhi kya karoon jisse dono side thoda sambhal jaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide small steps to pause the immediate pressure.
text: Is waqt sab kuch ek sath sambhalne ki jagah, tum do choti cheezein try kar sakti ho—jaise ek diary mein apne true emotions express karna bina darr ke, ya apne partner se bas ek chota sa respectful pause maang lena taaki tum mentally thoda shaant ho sako.

speaker: Seeker
text: I think the respectful pause makes sense. I can't break up suddenly, but right now continuing normal chats makes me feel more guilty. But main usko ye baat kaise bolu bina usko hurt kiye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Help execute the action of taking a respectful pause.
text: Pehle usko ek simple text karo ki 'abhi ghar mein bahut zyada tension hai aur mujhe kuch waqt akele sochna hai'… phir apna phone thodi der side rakh do… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Okay, a text is better than a call right now. Call pe I will just start crying and then I will become weak again. Text karke phone band kar dungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize taking space under heavy family pressure.
text: Kayi baar jab parivaar ka itna heavy dabaw hota hai, toh thoda time aur space lena khud ko shaant rakhne ke liye zaroori hota hai, isse kisi ki disrespect nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes, space is what I need. Right now my mind is completely blocked. Papa ka gussa, mummy ke aansoo... it's all too much for me to process.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the mental overwhelm and need for space.
text: In sab aawazon aur emotions ki bheed mein, lagatar yahi sab sochne ki wajah se tumhara dimaag puri tarah thak chuka hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul thak chuka hai. Main bas ek din without all this tension sochna chahti hoon. Kal subah se main phir apni books aur college notes par dhyaan dungi, taaki mind divert ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Explore how the diversion helps her cope.
text: Jab tum apni padhai ki taraf dhyaan le jane ka sochti ho, toh usse tumhe is poori bhaari situation mein kis tarah ki rahat milti hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Padhai karke at least I feel like I am doing something right. It's the only place where caste or izzat doesn't interfere. It's just me and my future.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how books provide an escape from the duty role.
text: Tumhari kitaabein tumhare liye ek aisi safe jagah ban gayi hain jahan tum sirf ek student hoti ho, aur badi beti hone ka koi bojh wahan nahi aana hota.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes! That's exactly my escape. Wahan koi expectation nahi hoti ki main kiske liye aur kya sacrifice kar rahi hoon. I am just reading and understanding things.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer another supportive action using her existing relationships.
text: Toh jab tak ghar ka mahaul poori tarah thoda shaant nahi hota, tum apne padhai wale us safe zone mein zyada waqt bita sakti ho, ya apni behen ke saath bina kisi serious topic ke thodi der normal baatcheet kar sakti ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Behen ke saath baat karna acha rahega. She is innocent in all this mess. I don't want to completely ignore her because of my own sadness.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Frame the sibling bond as a positive space outside of duty.
text: Apne chote bhai-behen ke saath simple pal bitana hume yaad dilata hai ki family mein aur bhi rishte hain jo sirf izzat aur farz se nahi, balki pure pyaar se jude hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: True. Uske saath Ludo khelungi thodi der. I think she is also scared seeing the tension in the house right now.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how helping her sister helps her.
text: Us darr ke mahaul mein apni choti behen ko safe mehsoos karwana, tumhare aas-paas ka stress thoda kam kar dega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Apne pyar ko kurban karke
text: I feel much calmer now. Apne pyar ko kurban karke jo helplessness lag rahi thi, wo thodi kam hui hai. Maine usko text kar diya hai, and usne kaha he understands. That's a huge relief.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Check on how the action impacted her.
text: Ye text bhej kar aur apne partner ka samjhdari wala response dekh kar abhi tumhe mentally kaisa lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: I feel much lighter. The guilt about my parents and my sister is still there, but at least I took one step. Aaj raat I might finally be able to get some sleep.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Close gently reflecting the relief.
text: Aaj itne din baad ek chota sa pause wala kadam uthane ke karan, tum apne andar ki ghutan ko thoda kam karke at least aaram kar paogi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Apne sapne aur padhai ko aag lagakar main bas Papa ke aage sir jhukaye khadi hoon taaki unhe samaj ke taane na sunne padein
text: I am completely shattered. Papa ne kundali na milne ka bahana banakar mere boyfriend ko reject kar diya aur aaj achanak mera roka kisi aur ke sath fix kar diya bina meri marzi sune. Main andar se poori tarah toot chuki hoon par maine uff tak nahi ki, kyunki agar maine virodh kiya toh rishtedaron mein hamari naak kat jayegi. Apne sapne aur padhai ko aag lagakar main bas Papa ke aage sir jhukaye khadi hoon taaki unhe samaj ke taane na sunne padein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational sacrifice frame.
text: Tumne apne papa ko samaj ke taano se bachane ke liye, apni marzi aur sapno ko poori tarah se peeche chhod diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: maine uff tak nahi ki
text: Yes... I couldn't say a single word. Pata nahi kaise unhone achanak kisi aur se rishta pakka kar diya. Maine uff tak nahi ki. But I feel like I am dying inside. Is it wrong to feel this way when parents do this?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror feared consequence of family shaming.
text: Aisa lag raha hai ki agar tumne apni awaaz uthai, toh poore parivaar ki badnami ho jayegi, aur yahi darr tumhe chup rehne par majboor kar raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. I feel like I am such a coward. I couldn't even defend my own relationship. I am just quietly accepting this fake roka tomorrow. Sometimes I think I am a bad daughter for even wanting my own life.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge stigma softly and reframe as duty.
text: Tum apne chup rehne ko weakness aur buri beti hone ki nishani maan rahi ho, jabki asal mein tum bas apne ghar ki izzat bachane ki bhari duty nibha rahi ho...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Apne sapne aur padhai ko aag lagakar main bas Papa ke aage sir jhukaye khadi hoon
text: I guess... but it hurts so much. Mere dreams ka kya hoga, my masters degree... nobody cares. Apne sapne aur padhai ko aag lagakar main bas Papa ke aage sir jhukaye khadi hoon. I am just withdrawing into my shell.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask about the internal feeling of being ignored.
text: Jab tumhare sapno ko aur tumhari pasand ko is tarah se poori tarah andekha kar diya gaya, toh andar se yeh ghutan kaisi mehsoos ho rahi hai tumhe?

speaker: Seeker
text: It feels like my life has ended. I am just a puppet for this family's izzat now. Sometimes I feel like just ending everything so I don't have to face tomorrow's roka ceremony. Sorry, I shouldn't be saying this.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize mild risk and mirror duration of pain.
text: Aise bhari khayal aana bilkul natural hai jab sab kuch achanak haath se nikal raha ho, aur itne time se chali aa rahi tumhari khud ki zindagi aage ekdum dhundli lagne lage.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes... the path is completely dark. I want to respect my family but I can't just throw myself away. I feel so stuck and suffocated in this house. Please tell me if I am overreacting.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the core emotion of being trapped.
text: Lagta hai tum apne khud ke sapno aur parivaar ki izzat ke beech poori tarah se trapped aur helpless mehsoos kar rahi ho, jahan aage ka har rasta band dikh raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Helpless... completely helpless. Agar roka tod diya toh rishtedar kalesh karenge, Papa ki izzat jayegi. Agar ho jane diya toh main mar jaungi. Main kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate culturally.
text: Yeh uljhan aur helpless wali feeling bilkul waajib hai, kyunki humare society mein ladkiyon ki kundali aur 'naak' ke naam par unki azaadi aksar unse chheen li jati hai; ismein tumhari bilkul bhi galti nahi hai ki tum apne liye life chahti ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: It is so unfair. My boyfriend texted me, but I am not replying. I feel guilty because I betrayed him, and guilty because I am lying to my parents. I just want to hide somewhere.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror relational avoidance with partner.
text: Tum apne partner ka phone bhi isliye avoid kar rahi ho kyunki tumhe lagta hai ki is ghar ke pressure ke karan tumne uske saath nainsaafi kar di hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. My cousins all had arranged matches without a word. Log kya kahenge is everything for my family. I feel so alone dealing with this.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic normalisation.
text: Humare gharon mein achanak rishte tay kar dena bahut common hai—sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi openly ispe bolega nahi kyunki sabse bada darr yahi hota hai ki rishtedaar kya sochenge aur baap ki naak na kat jaye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. The relatives are already here. But I want to at least finish my masters before they get me married. Abhi roka rok nahi sakti, par main kya karoon? Koi raasta hai kya ki padhai bach jaye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide option for taking a small step.
text: Aise achanak wale mahoul mein sab kuch ek sath solve karna mushkil hai. Tum shayad sirf apne papa se akele mein masters poori karne ki shart par baat kar sakti ho, ya kisi aur bade elder ke through apna ye message convey karwa sakti ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Direct Papa se baat karna toh impossible hai, he will just shout. Par meri badi bua aayi hui hain, maybe I can ask her to convince Papa for my masters? Will that work?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Steps for Bua.
text: Pehle ek waqt dekho jab badi bua akeli hon aur mahoul thoda shant ho… phir unse sirf apni masters ki value ke baare mein baat karo, bina kisi rishte ka zikr kiye… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Okay, I can try that. I will only talk about the master's degree and how it adds izzat. I won't mention anything about stopping the roka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframe education and izzat.
text: Kayi baar humari families mein 'padhai' ko lekar bahut respect hoti hai, aur education ko izzat se jod kar dekhna ek safe tarika ban jata hai apna waqt thoda badhane ka.

speaker: Seeker
text: True. Bua might listen if I frame it like that. But what if she says roka ho jane do, we will see about studies later? I am just so scared to even speak.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror fear of rejection of studies.
text: Dekha jaye toh tumhe abhi bhi yeh darr hai ki padhai ki baat uthane par bhi unki taraf se tumhari awaaz ko daba diya jayega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Apne sapne aur padhai ko aag lagakar main bas sir jhukaye khadi hoon
text: Haan, I have no voice left. Kal roka hai. Apne sapne aur padhai ko aag lagakar main bas sir jhukaye khadi hoon. I just want to delay the wedding.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror duty frame over future decisions.
text: Is achanak tay hue roka ke pressure mein tumne ek badi beti ki duty nibhane ko apna farz maan liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: I just cry quietly. Or I write down my thoughts in my phone notes. I haven't replied to my boyfriend yet, I am just freezing up.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror relational coping (notes & avoidance).
text: Apni saari baatein notes mein chupa kar aur akele ro kar, tum apne aap ko is poore kalesh se safe rakhne ki koshish kar rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes. I have to protect my family's izzat. I will write a final message to my boyfriend in my notes tonight. I don't have the courage to send it.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Notes coping suggestion.
text: Is bhaari emotional waqt mein ek message notes mein hi type karna tumhe closure de sakta hai, aur usko wahi save rakhna abhi ke liye ek safe jagah ban sakta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: I will keep it in my notes. Sending it now will cause more drama if someone checks my phone. I will just stay quiet for tomorrow.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalising pausing emotions.
text: Bade aur achanak decisions wale dino mein apne emotions ko thoda pause dena aur unhe sirf apne paas safe rakhna ek bahut samajhdari bhara step hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: taaki samaj ke taane na sunne padein
text: Yes, I will just take it one day at a time. Kal chup chap rasam poori kar lungi taaki samaj ke taane na sunne padein. Maybe I will talk to Bua later.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror time/duration frame.
text: Kal us rasam ko poora karne ke waqt tak, tum is thode se samay ko apne aap ko sambhalne ke liye use kar rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes. That's the only way to avoid kalesh right now. I will attend the roka and just focus on saving my masters.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror role of focusing on studies.
text: Agle kuch dino ka ek clear target rakh kar tumne ek samajhdaar beti ki tarah apni limits tay kar li hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: I feel a tiny bit lighter. At least I have a small plan for my studies. Padhai bach gayi toh shayad I will survive this.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror feared consequence avoided.
text: Sach mein yeh plan aage ke kalesh se bachne aur apni padhai ko safe rakhne ka ek sahara ban gaya hai tumhare liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Main bas ghut-ghut kar ro rahi hoon aur unke faisle ko maan rahi hoon taaki samaaj mein unka sir hamesha uncha rahe
text: Mere love marriage ke proposal ko reject karne ke baad Papa ne aaj decide kar liya ki wo bhari dowry dekar meri shadi agle mahine hi apni biradari mein kar denge. Mujhe safety aur apna future chhinne ka bahut darr lag raha hai, par Papa ki heart condition aur parivaar ki 'izzat' dekh kar main bagawat nahi kar saki. Main bas ghut-ghut kar ro rahi hoon aur unke faisle ko maan rahi hoon taaki samaaj mein unka sir hamesha uncha rahe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational sacrifice for family izzat.
text: Papa ki heart condition aur parivaar ka samaj mein samman banaye rakhne ke liye, tum khud akele itne darr mein reh kar bhi aage badhne ki himmat dhoondh rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Main bas ghut-ghut kar ro rahi hoon
text: Yes. Main bas ghut-ghut kar ro rahi hoon akele mein. Agle mahine hi shadi hai, itni jaldi. Dowry bhi de rahe hain wo log jo mujhe jaante tak nahi. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha kya karoon, I'm just so terrified for my life.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of the dowry marriage.
text: Aisa lag raha hai ki is jaldi tay hue rishte aur dowry ke pressure ke beech, tumhein apne aage ke future aur safety ko le kar ek bohot bada darr kha raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bagawat nahi kar saki
text: Exactly. I mean log kya kahenge dowry li hai? Par main unse bagawat nahi kar saki. Agar unko heart attack aa gaya meri wajah se toh main apne aap ko kabhi maaf nahi kar paungi. Maybe I'm just a coward for not fighting back.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Address the stigma cue softly without a question.
text: Tum apne aap ko coward maan rahi ho kyunki tumhe lagta hai ki tumne apne papa ki health ki fikr mein aakar khud ke liye awaaz uthane se piche hatna chuna...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ghut-ghut kar ro rahi hoon
text: Haan, main apni pasand ke ladke ko nahi chhodna chahti thi, but unke aage kuch bolne ki himmat nahi hui. Ab mera future bilkul blank lag raha hai. Bas chup reh kar sab tamasha dekh rahi hoon, hoping some miracle will stop it.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask about the internal conflict between her sacrifice and the fear.
text: Jab tum ek taraf itna darr mehsoos kar rahi ho future ko le kar, aur doosri taraf gharwalon ki health ke liye chup rehna padh raha hai, toh is dohare bojh ko uthana kaisa lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: It's suffocating. Poori raat neend nahi aati. Din mein main normal behave karne ki acting karti hoon taaki unko tension na ho. It takes all my energy. Sometimes I just wish main agle din uthu hi na.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the mild risk and mirror the time frame of acting.
text: Aisi ghutan mein aise khayal aana bilkul natural hai... itne dino se har din lagatar normal hone ki ye acting karna sach mein tumhe andar tak thaka chuka hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Ek acting hi ban gayi hai meri life. Ek taraf love marriage karne wali azaad ladki thi, aaj dowry system accept karne wali laachaar beti ban gayi hoon. I feel like I'm totally stuck with no way out.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the feeling of being trapped.
text: Lagta hai tum parivaar ki safety aur apne khud ke asoolon ke beech aakar puri tarah se trapped aur helpless mehsoos kar rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: unke faisle ko maan rahi hoon taaki samaaj mein unka sir hamesha uncha rahe
text: Haan, trapped. Agar na karu toh papa ki tabiyat aur society ka tamasha, aur agar haan bolu toh apna future khatre mein. Isliye main unke faisle ko maan rahi hoon taaki samaaj mein unka sir hamesha uncha rahe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm the cultural weight she's carrying.
text: Tumhara yeh darr aur helplessness dono bilkul haqiqat hain, kyunki humari society mein betiyon ke kandho par izzat ka itna dabaav rakha jata hai ki unhein majbooran apni safety par bhi samjhauta karna padta hai; is uljhan mein aana tumhari fault nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: I wish mere parents samajh paate ki meri khushi bhi utni hi zaroori thi jitni unki izzat. Par biradari ka darr unke liye sabse upar hai. I feel like main apne bf ko dhokha de rahi hoon bina kuch lade.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share systemic background about biradari pressure.
text: Aise achanak shadiyaan tay karna aur biradari ka darr sabse upar rakhna humare gharon mein bahut common hai—sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi is pressure ke baare mein baat nahi karta kyunki maa-baap ke aage bolna bagawat mana jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Main bas ghut-ghut kar ro rahi hoon
text: Bagawat hi thi mere liye unse pyar karna. Ab main thak chuki hoon. Boyfriend ke calls ignore karti hoon, bas akele mein ro leti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the relational coping (avoiding calls).
text: Apne calls ko ansundekha karke aur akele mein takleef utha kar, tum abhi is rishte se aur ghar ke tamashe se khud ko bachane ki koshish mein lagi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, but calls ignore karna is not a solution. He is getting worried. And yahan mere ghar me taiyari shuru ho gayi hai. Mujhe kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka... kaise deal karu is sab se without fighting with Papa?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide non-confrontational communication options.
text: Abhi jab bagawat mumkin nahi lag rahi, toh shayad tum mummy se sirf apni ghabrahat ke baare mein baat kar sakti ho bina us ladke ka zikr kiye, ya apne boyfriend ko ek chota sa text bhej sakti ho ki ghar mein emergency hai aur tum baad mein baat karogi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Text bhejna theek rahega. He deserves to know ki main usko intentionally ignore nahi kar rahi, bus ghar mein halat kharab hai. Main use message bhej dungi ki abhi contact na kare.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through the small action.
text: Pehle usko ek simple text likho ki 'abhi ghar mein thodi emergency hai aur main contact nahi kar paungi, please pareshaan na ho'… phir apna phone silent par rakh do… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes, I will do this. Isse at least uska darr kam hoga aur main bhi baar-baar phone ring hone ke stress se bachungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalise taking pause.
text: Aise tense mahaul mein jab sab kuch ek sath sambhalna mushkil ho, toh apni limits ko set karke communication pause karna mental peace ko maintain karne mein bohot madagar hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Right. Mujhe ye stress bhi tha ki uski kya galti hai. But right now I really need that space. Mummy ki baari... I don't know, kya mummy meri dowry wali darr ko samjhengi?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the fear of misunderstanding from the mother.
text: Tumhe ye bhi darr hai ki agar tumne apni maa se shadi aur dowry ki ghabrahat ke baare mein kuch kaha, toh shayad wo is takleef ko poori tarah na samajh paayein.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: unke faisle ko maan rahi hoon taaki samaaj mein unka sir hamesha uncha rahe
text: Haan, wo ulta mujhe hi bolengi ki adjust karo. Dowry is normal for them. I think unko abhi kuch na bolu hi toh accha hai. I am just quietly accepting it.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask how she manages internally when staying quiet.
text: Jab tum apne ghar mein adjust karne wali is chup-chaap duty ko akele hi sehan kar rahi ho, toh aise mein khud ko thodi rahat dene ke liye kya karti ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: I lock my room door and just listen to some old music. Ya phir apne office ka pending kaam khatam karti hoon. It stops me from overthinking.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the coping action.
text: To tum apne office ke kaam aur music ki panah lekar is shadi aur dowry ke baare mein baar-baar chalne wale unn khayalon ko rokne ki koshish karti ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes, office work helps a lot. They haven't asked me to quit my job yet, thankfully. So I hold on to that.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer a suggestion based on her job.
text: Toh abhi jab tak baaki baaton par tumhara bas nahi chal raha, tab tak tum apni us office job par dhyaan laga sakti ho, jahan sirf tumhara apna control chalta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes. My independence there is the only thing keeping me sane. I will continue doing my work properly. Even if I marry, I'll fight to keep my job.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalise finding independence in small things.
text: Kayi ladkiyan jo shaadi aur izzat ke dabaav mein aati hain, wo bhi apni jobs ko apne vishwas ka ek zariya banati hain taaki unki apni alag identity bachi rahe.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Main bas ghut-ghut kar ro rahi hoon
text: Exactly. Job meri izzat hai. And maine usko text bhej diya hai, usne kaha he will give me space. Ghut-ghut kar rone se toh acha hai ki main kaam karu.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the shift to agency.
text: Ro kar helpless mehsoos karne ki jagah, tumne apni energy us ek cheez par lagane ka tay kiya hai jo tumhari khud ki mehnat ki pehchaan hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes, thank you. Sirf ek message bhejne se aur is choti baat par dhyan lagane se I feel a bit more in control today.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final check in.
text: Sunkar acha laga ki ye kadam tumhara bojh thoda kam kar paaya; ab thodi der ke liye kya apne favorite music ke saath aaram karna chahogi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main wahi karungi abhi. Kaam khatam ho gaya, now just some music and sleep. Tomorrow is another day.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Close gently.
text: Kal ke aane tak apne aap ko thoda music aur neend ke through relax karne ka yeh step aaj ke liye tumhari sabse badi safety hai.
